title: hieracium glaucinum subsp. medium
intro: Hieracium glaucinum subsp. medium, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium glaucinum subsp. medium include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are often used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
